name: Senator Lindsey Graham
subject: If I run -- I will run to win
body:
| |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

I grew up in my family's restaurant and pool hall in the small, blue-collar town of Central, South Carolina. Never, in my wildest dreams, did I think that one day I might run for **President of the United States**.

However, today, with such a vital need to secure our country's future, I feel that it is my duty to consider such an important idea. I have served in our nation's military for 33 years alongside our country's bravest and proudest patriots. I have spent considerable time on the ground in the Middle East talking with our allies and our military commanders. I have both the record of leadership and the necessary resolve to pursue that high office \-- especially at this time when our nation's security and our position in the world are at risk.

**I am well aware that if I enter the race for the Republican presidential nomination, it will be one of the most important decisions of my life. It will be a huge, costly commitment of time, money and effort. I'll be up against some powerful contenders. But it is a challenge I believe I am uniquely qualified to take on.**

If I decide to run, **I will be in it to win** \-- _not just to make a point_. I will enter the race with the goals of rescuing America from eight years of Barack Obama's disastrous policies, making our nation stronger, and setting us on a safe and prosperous course that will last for decades.

I recently established a "testing the waters" committee called Security Through Strength to fund my travels around the country so I can listen to Americans and gauge support for a potential presidential campaign.

Today, Friend, as one of my key supporters, I am turning to you for help. Before I make my final decision about a White House run, I need to know that you are with me.

To that end, **[I am asking you to please make a generous contribution help support my presidential "testing the waters" organization, Security Through Strength](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27718468:26653670113:m:1:877327319:0844AED1E4C997742C14B6352584A31C:r)**.

Senator Lindsey Graham

P.S. In today's perilous world, **we must keep our country secure and protect the American Dream**. We owe it to our children and grandchildren to do no less.

Friend, if I decide to run for the Republican nomination for President, I will run to win. Today, I am asking you to support my "testing the waters" activities as I explore a potential candidacy. I hope you will stand with me in this important effort **[by making a contribution of $25, $50 $100, or whatever you can afford today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27718468:26653670113:m:1:877327319:0844AED1E4C997742C14B6352584A31C:r)**. Thanks, Lindsey

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27718468:26653670113:m:1:877327319:0844AED1E4C997742C14B6352584A31C:r) |

_Security Through Strength is a 527 political organization registered with the Internal Revenue Service._

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 14, 2015. For more information
[click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iW9FFEw1Na).
[Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW9FFEw1Na) | [Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW9FFEw1Na)

name: Sally Bradshaw
subject: Right to Rise Update: Liberty University speech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc
body:
Friend -

It was a big weekend for Right to Rise. The Governor had the honor of giving the commencement address at Liberty University on Saturday, but beforehand he weighed in on who he would like to see give a commencement speech.

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3257:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

You can see the full video recap as well at: [**https://righttorisepac.org/right-rise-pac-honorary-chairman-gov-jeb-bushs-remarks-liberty-university-commencement/**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3258:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

Finally, we wanted to share a family moment from Mother's Day. Jeb Jr. recorded this quick message from the Governor and Columba. Take a look below.

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3259:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

All in all, a great week. Take a look at some of the press coverage and positive feedback from the Governor's speech at Liberty University.

[**Washington Post, "The GOP primary's best speech on faith"**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3260:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)
Washington Post
Jennifer Rubin
May 11, 2015

[**Commentary Magazine, "A Lesson in How Faith Improves Politics"**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3261:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)
Commentary
Peter Wehner
May 10, 2015

**The[NYT](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3262:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE) reported**: Gov Bush "deplored a 'false narrative that casts religious Americans as intolerant scolds, running around trying to impose their views on everyone.'."

_" Jeb Bush delivered a forceful defense of religious freedom from a secular government during a speech at an evangelical university on Saturday, deploring the rise of "coercive federal power" under President Obama that he said was seeking to impose progressive dogma on the country's faithful."_

_**And on twitter ...**_

[@brithume](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3263:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE): Attn: Christians of every stripe. Has anyone made a more thoughtful defense of the faith than Jeb Bush this weekend?

[@ZekeMiller](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3264:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE): In @LibertyU speech, @JebBush works to show that he can talk about issues of religious freedom without alienating half the country

[@meganmurp](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3265:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE): Fascinating, full-throated yet thoughtful defense of Christianity's role in society by @JebBush at Liberty University today...

[@MZHemingway](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3266:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE): Color me impressed with @JebBush's speech at (Christian uni) Liberty today. Pitch perfect on religious freedom and role of faith in politics
[ ](https://www.facebook.com/jebbush) [ ](https://twitter.com/jebbush)
Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.[www.RighttoRisePac.org](www.RighttoRisePac.org)
Right to Rise PO Box 14349 Tallahassee, FL 32317
[Unsubscribe](http://www.mail.righttorisepac.org/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=394&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=15)

name: Governor Scott Walker
subject: Peter - don’t miss out.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
_****_
****
****
[****](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI2MjkyNjcS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYxMDM0MDUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
**
******Peter,

Our records show that you still have not become a Charter Member. Will you join now?
[_RED MEMBERSHIP >>>_](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI2MjkyNjcS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYxMDM0MDUwS0&mt=1&rt=0) | [_WHITE MEMBERSHIP >>>_](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI2MjkyNjcS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYxMDM0MDUwS0&mt=1&rt=0) | [BLUE MEMBERSHIP >>>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI2MjkyNjcS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYxMDM0MDUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---|---|---

At Our American Revival we are focused on building an America that is most responsive to the taxpayer as possible. We know that you hold the power, not government bureaucrats. We work every day for big, bold reforms, like the ones I instituted in Wisconsin. [Will you join us in this fight by becoming a Charter Member?](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI2MjkyNjcS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYxMDM0MDUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you,

Governor Scott Walker

__
__
__
__
__
_**[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI2MjkyNjcS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYxMDM0MDUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**_

**

****
**

Paid for by Our American Revival

name: Robby Mook, Hillary for America
subject: A strong start matters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Friend --

At midnight tonight we hit our first deadline as a campaign, and we're going to pull our record of Founding Donors -- everyone who stepped up to support this campaign in its first month.

Donate $10 right now, and make sure that I see your name at the top of that list:

http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI2MzcwMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=2&j=NTYxMTMwODM0S0&mt=1&rt=0

You and I both know how important a strong start is. By donating before midnight, you're going to be a part of our success from the very beginning – you’re helping build a campaign that can win.

Thanks for your support.

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

DONATE: http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjI2MzcwMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=2&j=NTYxMTMwODM0S0&mt=1&rt=0 /#%%

***************

PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA

Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

Hillary for America, PO Box 5256, New York, NY 10185

Privacy Policy: http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjI2MzcwMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=2&j=NTYxMTMwODM0S0&mt=1&rt=0

name: Hillary for America
subject: One month update:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
We're fighting back. | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI2Mzk0NDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxMTU4MDMwS0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend --

In the one month since we launched this campaign, Republican candidates have attacked Hillary almost every day. Can you imagine what the next year will look like?

We never expected things to be easy -- we need to make sure we have the resources to fight back.

Tonight, one month since the campaign launched, we're closing the books on our list of Founding Donors -- the official record of supporters who've backed Hillary from the start.

**Put your name on that list. Chip in $5 right now, and let Hillary know she can count on you:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/donate/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjI2Mzk0NDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxMTU4MDMwS0&mt=2&rj=NTYxMTU4MDMwS0&rt=0)**

Founding Donors will be the core of this campaign and make us strong enough to fight these outlandish attacks -- now and for the next year. Don't miss this moment.

Thanks for stepping up,

Hillary for America [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjI2Mzk0NDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxMTU4MDMwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjI2Mzk0NDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxMTU4MDMwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
